name: management.client-capabilities
title: Status Management Client Capabilities
description: A status report of the client's protocol capabilities.

payloadkeys.title: Status item value.
payloadkeys.content: An object that contains the client's protocol capabilities. These typically only change when the device upgrades its software. An implicit status subscription for this status item is always present, so the client always reports changes to the server.

subkeys.title: Supported Protocol Versions
subkeys.content: A list of protocol versions that the client supports.

subkeys.title: Supported Protocol Version
subkeys.content: A protocol version supported by the client.

subkeys.title: Supported Features
subkeys.content: A set of optional protocol features that the client supports. Each object's key represents a feature, and the property value represents the feature's associated parameters.
Optional protocol features supported by the client.

subkeys.title: Supported Payloads
subkeys.content: A set of declaration and status items that the client supports.

subkeys.title: Supported Declarations
subkeys.content: A set of declarations that the client supports.

subkeys.title: Supported Activations
subkeys.content: An array of strings that represents the activation types that the client supports.

subkeys.title: Supported Assets
subkeys.content: An array of strings that represents the assets that the client supports.

subkeys.title: Supported Configurations
subkeys.content: An array of strings that represents the configuration types that the client supports.

subkeys.title: Supported Management Declarations
subkeys.content: An array of strings that represents the declaration types that the client supports.

subkeys.title: Supported Status Items
subkeys.content: A list of status items that the client supports.
